description_long: This is a large, single-story residential house set within a fenced lot, surrounded by lush landscaping including rows of trees and palm trees. The house features a complex roofline with multiple gabled and hipped sections, and a spacious wooden deck area that wraps around the rear and sides. The backyard includes a swimming pool, outdoor seating, and a barbecue area, all integrated into the deck. The front facade is symmetrical, with large arched windows and a central entryway flanked by columns and a small set of steps. The property is bordered by a low fence and has a mix of paved and grassy areas, providing both privacy and aesthetic appeal. The overall design blends Mediterranean and modern ranch influences, with light-colored exterior walls and dark roofing.
description: A spacious, single-story house with a complex gabled roof, large arched windows, and extensive wooden decking, surrounded by trees and a fenced yard. The property features a pool, outdoor living spaces, and a prominent front entryway with columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, arched windows, central entryway with columns, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wooden deck, pool, outdoor seating, barbecue area, and palm trees along the back fence.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with a clear look at the main entry, driveway, and symmetrical window arrangement, plus the front landscaping.
description_view_3: Side/rear angle showing the deck, pool, and outdoor amenities, as well as the dense tree line along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with double doors, flanked by columns, small steps, and an overhanging roof
